description:
You are acting as a junior data-analyst on a Linux workstation.  
Inside the directory  

  /home/user/project  

there is already a file called  

  /home/user/project/raw_sales.csv  

containing transactional sales data.  
Your job is to convert the CSV data to JSON, validate the JSON against a formal
JSON-Schema, extract the high-value transactions (total > 1000), and produce a
small human-readable summary log.

Required end-state of the system
--------------------------------
After you finish, **all of the following files must exist and have
exactly the described contents and names**:

1. /home/user/project/salesdata.json  
   • A single JSON array (not NDJSON) holding one object per CSV row.  
   • Object keys MUST be spelled exactly: `Date`, `Region`, `Rep`,
     `Item`, `Units`, `Unit_Cost`, `Total`.  
   • `Units` must be a JSON integer.  
   • `Unit_Cost` and `Total` must be JSON numbers (not strings).  
   • Whitespace/indentation is irrelevant, but the data values must
     match the original CSV exactly.

2. /home/user/project/sales_schema.json  
   • A JSON Schema (Draft-07 or later) that describes *salesdata.json*.  
   • It must require every field listed above and assert the correct
     JSON types (e.g., `"Units"` = integer, `"Total"` = number, etc.).  
   • The schema itself is a JSON object; formatting is irrelevant.

3. /home/user/project/sales_validation.log  
   • Plain-text file, **one single line**:  
     Validation: PASS  
     (use *exactly* that capitalization, a single colon, one space,
     `PASS`, and a trailing newline).

4. /home/user/project/high_value_sales.json  
   • A JSON array containing **only** those objects from
     salesdata.json whose `Total` value is strictly greater than
     1000.  
   • The objects must appear in the same order as in salesdata.json.

5. /home/user/project/sales_summary.log  
   • Plain-text file containing **exactly four lines** in this order:  
       TotalRecords: <integer>  
       TotalSales: <number>  
       HighValueRecords: <integer>  
       HighValueSales: <number>  
   • There must be a single space after every colon.  
   • `TotalSales` and `HighValueSales` must be formatted with **two
     decimal places** (e.g., `4447.14`).  
   • No extra whitespace or blank lines are allowed.

Process requirements
--------------------
1. Convert raw_sales.csv to JSON and save it as **salesdata.json**.  
   You may use csvkit, Python, awk, or any tool available in a typical
   Ubuntu container.

2. Create **sales_schema.json** that correctly describes the JSON
   structure.

3. Validate salesdata.json against the schema.  If the file validates
   successfully, write the literal text line  
   `Validation: PASS`  
   into **sales_validation.log** (overwrite any existing content).

4. Use **jq** to extract every record whose `Total` value is greater
   than 1000 and save the result to **high_value_sales.json**.

5. With jq (or any scripting language) calculate:  
   • the total number of records in salesdata.json  
   • the sum of all `Total` values  
   • the number of records in high_value_sales.json  
   • the sum of `Total` in high_value_sales.json  
   Write these four metrics to **sales_summary.log** following the
   exact key order and two-decimal formatting described earlier.

6. Make sure every file lives directly in **/home/user/project** and
   has default user-writable permissions (no root privileges needed).

Verification notes
------------------
Automated tests will check:

• That every required file exists at the exact path.  
• That JSON files are syntactically valid and contain the correct
  records.  
• That the schema file really requires all fields with the exact JSON
  types.  
• That sales_validation.log contains the exact single line shown
  above.  
• That sales_summary.log follows the prescribed format **and** the
  numeric values are mathematically correct for the provided data.  

Follow the steps sequentially; feel free to display intermediate console
output while you work. Good luck!

Contents (7 × exactly 7 commas per line):

2023-07-02,West,Kivell,Binder,50,19.99,999.50
2023-07-03,East,Jardine,Pencil,36,4.99,179.64
2023-07-04,East,Gill,Pen,27,19.99,539.73
2023-07-05,Central,Sorvino,Pencil,56,2.99,167.44
2023-07-06,East,Jones,Binder,60,4.99,299.40
2023-07-07,West,Andrews,Pencil,75,1.99,149.25
2023-07-08,Central,Jardine,Pen Set,90,15.99,1439.10
2023-07-09,Central,Thompson,Binder,32,4.99,159.68
2023-07-10,East,Jones,Pencil,65,4.99,324.35

Correct final artifacts
-----------------------

   (minified below; whitespace ignored by grader)

[{"Date":"2023-07-01","Region":"East","Rep":"Jones","Item":"Pencil","Units":95,"Unit_Cost":1.99,"Total":189.05},{"Date":"2023-07-02","Region":"West","Rep":"Kivell","Item":"Binder","Units":50,"Unit_Cost":19.99,"Total":999.5},{"Date":"2023-07-03","Region":"East","Rep":"Jardine","Item":"Pencil","Units":36,"Unit_Cost":4.99,"Total":179.64},{"Date":"2023-07-04","Region":"East","Rep":"Gill","Item":"Pen","Units":27,"Unit_Cost":19.99,"Total":539.73},{"Date":"2023-07-05","Region":"Central","Rep":"Sorvino","Item":"Pencil","Units":56,"Unit_Cost":2.99,"Total":167.44},{"Date":"2023-07-06","Region":"East","Rep":"Jones","Item":"Binder","Units":60,"Unit_Cost":4.99,"Total":299.4},{"Date":"2023-07-07","Region":"West","Rep":"Andrews","Item":"Pencil","Units":75,"Unit_Cost":1.99,"Total":149.25},{"Date":"2023-07-08","Region":"Central","Rep":"Jardine","Item":"Pen Set","Units":90,"Unit_Cost":15.99,"Total":1439.1},{"Date":"2023-07-09","Region":"Central","Rep":"Thompson","Item":"Binder","Units":32,"Unit_Cost":4.99,"Total":159.68},{"Date":"2023-07-10","Region":"East","Rep":"Jones","Item":"Pencil","Units":65,"Unit_Cost":4.99,"Total":324.35}]

2. /home/user/project/sales_schema.json  
   (whitespace ignored)

{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["Date","Region","Rep","Item","Units","Unit_Cost","Total"],"properties":{"Date":{"type":"string"},"Region":{"type":"string"},"Rep":{"type":"string"},"Item":{"type":"string"},"Units":{"type":"integer"},"Unit_Cost":{"type":"number"},"Total":{"type":"number"}}}}

3. /home/user/project/high_value_sales.json  

[{"Date":"2023-07-08","Region":"Central","Rep":"Jardine","Item":"Pen Set","Units":90,"Unit_Cost":15.99,"Total":1439.1}]

4. /home/user/project/sales_validation.log  

Validation: PASS\n

5. /home/user/project/sales_summary.log

TotalSales: 4447.14\n
HighValueRecords: 1\n
HighValueSales: 1439.10\n
